caption: The video begins with a close-up of a person's hand unzipping a black jacket, revealing a glimpse of a white object underneath. The scene then transitions to a different setting where the same hand is shown holding a white bottle. The hand presses down on the bottle's nozzle, and an animated illustration of a spring appears above it, indicating the mechanism of the bottle. Text on the screen reads "WITH LEAK FREE DESIGN," emphasizing the bottle's feature. The focus remains on the hand and the bottle, highlighting its functionality and design.
